nasb.text: Of the sons of the priests: the sons of Habaiah, the sons of Hakkoz, the sons of Barzillai, who took a wife from the daughters of Barzillai the Gileadite, and he was called by their name.

esv.text: Also, of the sons of the priests: the sons of Habaiah, the sons of Hakkoz, and the sons of Barzillai (who had taken a wife from the daughters of Barzillai the Gileadite, and was called by their name).

cnv.text: 祭司的子孫中，有哈巴雅的子孫、哈哥斯的子孫和巴西萊的子孫；巴西萊娶了基列人巴西萊的一個女兒為妻，所以起名叫巴西萊。
